prompt_text: Best AI tooling alternatives for engineering teams building and debugging production LLM applications teams on a budget
response:
# Budget-Friendly AI Tooling for Production LLM Engineering

## Observability & Debugging

**Open Source (Best Value)**
- **Langsmith alternatives**: [Arize](https://arize.com) (freemium), [Weights & Biases](https://wandb.ai) (generous free tier)
- **Local tracing**: [Jaeger](https://www.jaegertracing.io/) + OpenTelemetry
- **Log aggregation**: [Loki](https://grafana.com/oss/loki/) + Grafana (self-hosted)

**Lightweight Commercial**
- [Fiddler AI](https://www.fiddler.ai) - model monitoring with free tier
- [Humanloop](https://humanloop.com) - $0 to start, pay as you grow

## Development & Testing

**Free/Self-Hosted**
- **LLM testing**: [Promptfoo](https://www.promptfoo.dev/) (OSS, local CLI)
- **Evals**: [Braintrust](https://www.braintrustdata.com) (free tier + open source)
- **Prompt versioning**: Git + simple YAML configs (no special tool needed)

**Cheap Alternatives to LangSmith**
- [Pezzo](https://www.pezzo.ai/) - open source prompt management
- [Vellum](https://www.vellum.ai) - $200/mo starting point vs $600+
- [HoneyHive](https://www.honeyhive.ai) - better free tier

## Cost Optimization

**Core Strategy**
- Use **OpenAI's API logging** + self-built dashboard (surprisingly capable)
- **Structured JSON logging** to CloudWatch/Datadog free tier
- Batch non-critical requests; cache aggressively

**Tools**
- [LiteLLM](https://www.litellm.ai/) (OSS) - proxy to optimize provider costs
- [Portkey](https://portkey.ai) - free tier includes cost tracking
- **Homemade dashboards**: Grafana + PromQL on cloud provider metrics

## Testing & Quality

**Budget Picks**
- [Pytest-llm](https://github.com/Agentic-Labs/pytest-llm) - local LLM assertions
- **Claude/GPT-4 as judge**: Roll your own evaluator (cheaper than specialized tools)
- [Cleanlab Studio](https://cleanlab.ai) - free data quality checks
- [GitHub Copilot](https://github.com/features/copilot) - $10/mo for team code review

## CI/CD Integration

- **Self-hosted runners** on cheap VPS ($5-15/mo) vs GitHub Actions
- **Pre-commit hooks** with local LLM validation
- **Scheduled evals** on cron (AWS Lambda free tier or similar)

## Practical Starting Stack ($0-500/month)

```
Development:
- Promptfoo (local) ✓
- LiteLLM proxy (self-hosted) ✓
- Git + structured logging ✓

Staging:
- Braintrust (free tier) or roll your own eval framework
- Grafana + Loki (self-hosted on $5/mo instance)

Production:
- Arize free tier OR Weights & Biases
- OpenTelemetry to self-hosted collector
- Custom dashboards on your cloud provider
```

## What NOT to Cheap Out On

- **Don't skip evals** - use free tools aggressively instead
- **Production monitoring** - at least basic (not optional)
- **Version control for prompts** - even if just Git
- **Cost tracking** - catch runaway LLM bills early

## Honest Tradeoffs

| Tool Type | Budget Pick | Cost | Tradeoff |
|-----------|------------|------|----------|
| Prompt management | Git + YAML | $0 | Manual versioning |
| Evals | Promptfoo | $0 | CLI-based, no UI |
| Observability | Grafana + Loki | $30/mo | Self-managed |
| Labeling | Argilla | $0 | Community support only |
| Testing | Custom + OpenAI API | $5-50
